Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets list out the existing activities first from the given model StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: we need to add activities related to sensitive attributes and fairness checks right Because the problem mentions things like CheckApplicantRace ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First sensitive attribute events lets say CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge Then fairness related activities ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: where could bias happen Suppose that when CheckApplicantRace a sensitive attribute event happens if theres no check someone could go straight to Reject right Or if a ManualReview isnt done for minority applicants thats a problem

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Coexistence means that if A occurs at least once in the trace then B occurs at least once and if B occurs at least once then A occurs at least once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Response A B means If A occurs then B occurs at least once after A Precedence A B means If B occurs then A occurs at least once before B

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: lets add Coexistence between each sensitive check and ManualReview

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Response CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck means that whenever CheckApplicantRace occurs BiasMitigationCheck must occur at least once after it

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision with support 1 point 0 confidence 1 point 0 That means that if FinalDecision occurs then BiasMitigationCheck must have occurred before it

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: what about other sensitive attributes like gender and age We should add the same constraints for CheckApplicantGender and CheckApplicantAge because bias can be based on any sensitive attribute

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: NonChainSuccession CheckApplicantRace FinalDecision with support 1 point 0 confidence 1 point 0

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait whats the difference between NonSuccession and NonChainSuccession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: lets get the definitions right from DECLARE spec

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The problem explicitly says to use non succession or non chain succession for preventing direct succession

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: if we want to ban any occurrence of A immediately followed by B even if theres another A not followed by B then NonChainSuccession alone is not enough

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: maybe the problem assumes that the sensitive attribute check occurs only once per trace If thats the case then NonChainSuccession would work So we can add an Exactly_one constraint for each sensitive check activity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Because in a loan application you check the applicants attributes once right So we can add Exactly_one CheckApplicantRace Exactly_one CheckApplicantGender Exactly_one CheckApplicantAge

Name: Validation - PE
Text: with these Exactly_one constraints the NonChainSuccession for each sensitive check to FinalDecision will work as intended

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Precedence ManualReview FinalDecision and Precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: since FinalDecision occurs in every trace then Precedence ManualReview FinalDecision would require ManualReview to exist in every trace which we do not want

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: if we want that whenever ManualReview occurs it is before FinalDecision then Response ManualReview FinalDecision is better

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Similarly Response BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision ensures that if BiasMitigationCheck exists it is before FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That fixes the earlier problem of requiring ManualReview and BiasMitigationCheck for all traces

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: the NonChainSuccession is redundant because the Response constraints already require that theres at least BiasMitigationCheck between CheckApplicantRace and FinalDecision but adding it is still okay as an extra layer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: lets check if all constraints are correct For a sensitive applicant CheckApplicantRace exists ManualReview is present BiasMitigationCheck is present ManualReview is before FinalDecision BiasMitigationCheck is before FinalDecision and CheckApplicantRace is not immediately followed by FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: if an applicant is not from a sensitive group no CheckApplicantRace and the Coexistence constraints do not apply so ManualReview and BiasMitigationCheck are not required
